abilities.name: Backstab
abilities.description: Attack roll +1 (in addition to normal bonuses). On a hit, deal triple damage instead of double.

abilities.name: Sneak Silently
abilities.description: Move without being heard. Opposed by listeners' Luck check or the judge's call based on circumstances.

abilities.name: Hide in Shadows
abilities.description: Conceal yourself in shadow or cover. Requires suitable cover; opposed by observers' perception.

abilities.name: Pick Lock
abilities.description: Open a mechanical lock without a key, given thieves' tools and enough time.

abilities.name: Pick Pocket
abilities.description: Lift a small item from a target without them noticing. Opposed by the target's Luck or awareness.

abilities.name: Climb Sheer Surfaces
abilities.description: Scale a wall or cliff without normal climbing gear, at reduced speed.

abilities.name: Cast Spell from Scroll
abilities.description: Attempt to read and trigger a magic scroll despite lacking formal spellcasting training. Failure may have a mishap at the judge's discretion.

abilities.name: Shortsword Attack
abilities.description: Attack roll: 1d20 + 2 (Agi). Damage: 1d6, or 3x on a successful Backstab.

abilities.name: Luck Die
abilities.description: Thieves may add a Luck Die (1d3 at this level) to any skill check, attack roll, or damage roll. Spent Luck recovers slowly between adventures, not on a simple rest.
